name: NIFCLOUD
description: NIFCLOUD — Fujitsu's Japanese cloud computing platform offering VMs, DBaaS, and managed services with Japanese data residency.

seo.title: NIFCLOUD — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: NIFCLOUD: NIFCLOUD — Fujitsu's Japanese cloud computing platform offering VMs, DBaaS, and managed services with Japanese data residency.

when_to_use: Japanese cloud infrastructure with domestic data residency
VPS and DBaaS for Japanese enterprise compliance
Managed services platform for Japanese government apps
Fujitsu-backed cloud for regulated Japanese industries
Local-latency compute for Japanese consumer applications

review.verdict: Acceptable only if Japanese data residency is mandatory; otherwise AWS Tokyo region wins on almost every axis.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises requiring domestic cloud compliance
review.not_for: Modern cloud-native workloads or global deployments

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
